report_name: Carnival Cruise Data Breach Exposes Nearly 6 Million Customers; ShinyHunters Claims Responsibility

threat_actors.name: ShinyHunters
threat_actors.description: A notorious extortion group that claimed responsibility for the Carnival Corporation data breach. The group gained access via a social engineering attack, exfiltrated customer data, and published it on their extortion portal after a ransom demand was not met.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through data theft and public leaks of sensitive information.

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing Attachment
attack_patterns.description: Used to gain initial access to Carnival Corporation's network by targeting an employee with a deceptive email, leading to credential or system compromise.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Used compromised employee credentials from the initial phishing attack to gain legitimate access to Carnival's IT environment.

attack_patterns.name: File and Directory Discovery
attack_patterns.description: Used to enumerate network shares and databases within Carnival's network to locate valuable customer data for exfiltration.

attack_patterns.name: Archive Collected Data
attack_patterns.description: The attackers collected and staged large volumes of customer data, which ShinyHunters claimed amounted to terabytes, before exfiltration.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: The collected customer data was transferred out of Carnival's network to attacker-controlled infrastructure.

identities.name: Carnival Corporation
identities.description: The world's largest cruise operator, which suffered a data breach impacting nearly 6 million customers after an employee's account was compromised via social engineering.

identities.name: Holland America Line
identities.description: A subsidiary of Carnival Corporation whose Mariner Society loyalty program data appears to have been compromised in the breach.

infrastructure.name: ShinyHunters Extortion Portal
infrastructure.description: An extortion website used by the ShinyHunters group to publish the stolen data from Carnival Corporation after their ransom demands were not met.

infrastructure.name: Exfiltration Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Attacker-controlled infrastructure used to receive the large volumes of customer data exfiltrated from Carnival Corporation's network.
